monitoring_checks.description: Confirm the offline source freshness report fixture can be parsed.
monitoring_checks.escalation_threshold: any missing fixture report blocks release monitoring signoff

monitoring_checks.description: Confirm guardrail validation output is available from deterministic tests.
monitoring_checks.escalation_threshold: any failed deterministic guardrail validation blocks release monitoring signoff

rollback.procedure: Revert the local PP&D readiness proposal and rerun offline validation.

notes: Offline fixture-only readiness packet; no live automation or outcome guarantees.
